label: document-intelligence
description: Ideas focused on extracting, summarizing, and analyzing documents such as loan applications, regulatory reports, ESG filings, and financial contracts.

label: risk-detection
description: Ideas centered on detecting anomalies and predicting risks across fraud, credit, trade reconciliation, and payment monitoring.

label: customer-experience
description: Ideas aimed at improving customer-facing processes including complaint handling, onboarding, sentiment analysis, and advisory services.

label: operational-automation
description: Ideas automating internal operational processes such as meeting summarization, code review, incident analysis, and payment routing.

label: knowledge-retrieval
description: Ideas leveraging retrieval-augmented generation to surface knowledge from internal documentation and compliance data sources.
